records.question: Which students have a cell mobile number exactly +60(5)3280072514 and live in the USA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN student_addresses ON addresses.address_id = student_addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.country = 'USA' AND students.cell_mobile_number = '+60(5)3280072514'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 INNER JOIN Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id INNER JOIN Student_Addresses AS T3 ON T2.address_id = T3.address_id WHERE T1.cell_mobile_number = '+60(5)3280072514' AND T2.country = 'USA'

records.question: Which students have the email address lisette.brekke@example.net and live in the USA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE students.email_address = 'lisette.brekke@example.net' AND addresses.country = 'USA'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 INNER JOIN Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T1.email_address = 'lisette.brekke@example.net' AND T2.country = 'USA'

records.question: Which students named Emma Frederic Rohan with the email derrick.jenkins@example.com and cell number 235.899.9744 first rented on 2017-12-05 15:20:04 and left the university on or after 2018-03-03 03:33:05?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
WHERE students.date_first_rental = '2017-12-05 15:20:04' AND students.date_left_university >= '2018-03-03 03:33:05' AND students.email_address = 'derrick.jenkins@example.com' AND students.middle_name = 'Frederic' AND students.last_name = 'Rohan' AND students.cell_mobile_number = '235.899.9744' AND students.first_name = 'Emma'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 WHERE T1.date_first_rental = '2017-12-05 15:20:04' AND T1.date_left_university >= '2018-03-03 03:33:05' AND T1.email_address = 'derrick.jenkins@example.com' AND T1.middle_name = 'Frederic' AND T1.last_name = 'Rohan' AND T1.cell_mobile_number = '235.899.9744' AND T1.first_name = 'Emma'

records.question: Which students have the cell mobile number (874)070-9495, email address norwood.howell@example.org, and live at 11940 Pauline Shoals?

records.question: Who are the students named Eugene Tremblay with the email kertzmann.devon@example.net, recognized as first honor, who left the university on or after 2018-03-07 11:41:26?

records.question: Which students have an address where the city is New Annabellefort?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN student_addresses ON students.student_id = student_addresses.student_id
WHERE addresses.city = 'New Annabellefort'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 INNER JOIN Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id INNER JOIN Student_Addresses AS T3 ON T1.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T2.city = 'New Annabellefort' GROUP BY T1.student_id

records.question: Which students with the last name Gottlieb and email address dicki.kathryne@example.org lived in New Annabellefort on or before 2017-03-29 18:22:55 and left the university on or before 2018-03-18 16:07:42?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN student_addresses ON students.student_id = student_addresses.student_id
WHERE students.email_address = 'dicki.kathryne@example.org' AND students.last_name = 'Gottlieb' AND student_addresses.date_address_from <= '2017-03-29 18:22:55' AND addresses.city = 'New Annabellefort' AND students.date_left_university <= '2018-03-18 16:07:42'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 INNER JOIN Addresses AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id INNER JOIN Student_Addresses AS T3 ON T1.student_id = T3.student_id WHERE T1.email_address = 'dicki.kathryne@example.org' AND T1.last_name = 'Gottlieb' AND T1.date_left_university <= '2018-03-18 16:07:42' AND T2.city = 'New Annabellefort' AND T3.date_address_from <= '2017-03-29 18:22:55'

records.question: Which students named Misael with middle name Justyn first rented on or after 2017-10-15 06:52:46, left university exactly on 2018-03-18 07:01:27, have behavior incidents ending exactly on 2018-03-18 18:40:05, and assessment notes dated on or before 2014-04-28 02:07:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN assessment_notes ON students.student_id = assessment_notes.student_id
JOIN behavior_incident ON students.student_id = behavior_incident.student_id
WHERE students.date_first_rental >= '2017-10-15 06:52:46' AND students.middle_name = 'Justyn' AND behavior_incident.date_incident_end = '2018-03-18 18:40:05' AND assessment_notes.date_of_notes <= '2014-04-28 02:07:53' AND students.date_left_university = '2018-03-18 07:01:27' AND students.first_name = 'Misael'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 WHERE T1.date_first_rental >= '2017-10-15 06:52:46' AND T1.middle_name = 'Justyn' AND T1.date_left_university = '2018-03-18 07:01:27' AND T1.first_name = 'Misael' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Assessment_Notes AS T2 WHERE T1.student_id = T2.student_id AND T2.date_of_notes <= '2014-04-28 02:07:53' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Behavior_Incident AS T3 WHERE T1.student_id = T3.student_id AND T3.date_incident_end = '2018-03-18 18:40:05' )
